title: The Survivors Keep Falling
description: Sanji and Usopp risk themselves against Enel’s overwhelming power, buying time even when victory seems impossible.
scene: Across pages 4, 5, 6, 7, this scene centers on Enel, Nami, Sanji, Usopp, Gan Fall. Sanji and Usopp risk themselves against Enel’s overwhelming power, buying time even when victory seems impossible.

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: You've only been here a few days...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: And I'm the "breeder of the sky"!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: You've got to be kidding me.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I've raised him like no other animal!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I gave him martial arts lessons....!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Huh!! Even if I tell you...

summary: Sanji and Usopp risk themselves against Enel’s overwhelming power, buying time even when victory seems impossible.
